_doc: Item-overhaul v2 affixes (2026-06-04). Three families: generic (apply to any spell + any gear), class (boost one Str/Dex/Int spell class), archetype (per-spell uniques, only via implicit_affixes). Tiers are [min, max] 2-arrays per rarity (common→legendary) so each affix rolls a real range. AffixSystem.roll_affixes_for picks an integer in [min, max] inclusive at the correct rarity tier. Range damage affixes (e.g. of_embers) emit two values: bonus_min and bonus_max for the X-Y damage line in tooltips. The 'kind' field on each affix tells the formatter how to display it ('flat', 'pct', 'range', 'flag').

predicates.label: Berserker: HP low + peak ramp active

affixes._doc: Tier 2 mana-rework 2026-06-17 — aurastacker / archmage affix lane. of_zeal reduces aura reservation cost so a small-pool build can fit more auras. of_archmage scales spell damage with cast cost — the aurastacker payoff (gives up pool to fit auras → bigger casts hit proportionally harder). Both route through existing caps so number ceiling holds.
affixes.name: of Zeal

affixes._doc: Tier 3 mana-rework 2026-06-17 — build-expression affixes. Each enables a distinct caster archetype. high_tide rewards keeping the pool topped (Battlemage). siphon refunds mana on spell-hit (Sustain). clarity gives free-cast procs (lucky-feeling). mind_over_matter converts mana into a damage shield (Tanky-Mage). overflow_strike+evade complete the STR/DEX sustain stories.
affixes.name: of the High Tide

affixes._doc: PLAYTEST 2026-06-15 #28 + 2026-06-11sec #15 — visual-flair affixes. Lift prismatic/inverse/twisted/umbral from authored items to rollable affixes. flag-kind: writes a boolean stat on the bot at recompute. Visual rendering reads the stat via UITheme.flavor_color_for / item_cell.gd's flavor-tag pipeline. Mechanic: actor.gd reads each visual_* field from the bot. Common+ across slots so any drop can roll prestige.
affixes.name: of Umbra

predicates.label: Kiter: enemy near AND flee-vector exists
Executioner: target HP below finisher threshold
Glass Cannon: bot HP at full-strength threshold
Hunter: bound target is a boss
Grinder: enemies alive or loot visible on floor
